title: Q3 offsite Kanban setup (Pierre's canonical example)
description: A single, deceptively simple sentence hiding a multi-step composite task: a new project, a 3-column Kanban board, 10 tasks distributed across those columns, priorities, and due dates spread across a month.
promptTemplate: Set up a project called "{{prefix}}Q3 Offsite" to plan our Q3 offsite: a kanban board with three columns, ten tasks distributed across those columns, each task given a priority, and due dates spread across September 2026.
